heading: Critical positions
label: 732a Critical positions
notes: Amendments2008—Subsec. (b). substituted “paragraph (1) or (2) of section 731(e)” for “section 731(d), (e)(1), or (e)(2)”.Pub. L. 110–3232004—Subsec. (a). substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 108–271

children.text: be subject to the laws and regulations applicable to the General Accounting Office Senior Executive Service under , with respect to rates of basic pay, performance awards, ranks, carry over of annual leave, benefits, performance appraisals, removal or suspension, and reductions in force;1section 733 of this titleSee Change of Name note below.1
have the same rights of appeal to the General Accounting Office Personnel Appeals Board as are provided to the Office Senior Executive Service;1
be exempt from the same provisions of law as are made inapplicable to the Office Senior Executive Service under , except for ;section 733(d) of this titlesection 732(e) of this title
be entitled to discontinued service retirement under chapter 83 or 84 of title 5 as if a member of the Office Senior Executive Service; and

be subject to reassignment by the Comptroller General to any position in the Office Senior Executive Service under , as the Comptroller General determines necessary and appropriate.section 733 of this title
